hero.label: PT Global Dataverse Indonesia
hero.sub: Whether you're an organization that needs reliable systems or a founder trying to get your idea off the ground, GDI is here to make it happen.

manifesto.text: GDI IS NOT A TRADITIONAL IT CONSULTANCY — WE ARE BUILDERS — SYSTEMS. VENTURES. EXECUTION. — AI-FIRST. LONG-TERM. INDONESIA. —

dual_engine.label: THE DUAL-ENGINE MODEL
dual_engine.intro: Two interconnected engines. Together, they create a compounding business model that grows stronger over time.
dual_engine.engine1_desc: End-to-end system development and implementation for organizations. ERPNext and Frappe systems, AI integration, custom software, and digital infrastructure — delivered as a professional consulting engagement.
dual_engine.engine2_desc: GDI's core identity and long-term strategic focus. We go beyond service delivery and become a participant in building new companies — acting as a technical co-founder in exchange for equity.

quote.text: Technology should be used to empower human potential, not replace it.

cta.heading: Have something you want to build?
cta.sub: Whether you're an organization modernizing operations or a founder with an idea that needs technical execution — we want to hear about it.
cta.org_desc: Looking to modernize systems or integrate AI
cta.founder_desc: I have an idea that needs technical execution

footer.copyright: PT Global Dataverse Indonesia. All rights reserved.

about.hero_headline: A company built around execution and long-term work.
about.hero_sub: GDI is built around two kinds of work. One is helping organizations build and improve the systems behind their operations in a serious business to business setting. The other is working with founders through a venture building approach when there is strong conviction in both the idea and the people behind it.
about.position_quote: An AI-first systems integrator and technical venture builder — operating on the Frappe and ERPNext ecosystem and beyond.
about.position_body: We work with organizations that need modern digital infrastructure, and with founders who have strong ideas but need a technical backbone to bring those ideas to life. Our team has worked across industries including trade, logistics, manufacturing, and services.
about.flywheel_sub: Consulting work feeds venture opportunities, and successful ventures enhance reputation and deal flow. The two engines compound each other.
about.flywheel_step1_desc: Digitalization services generate stable revenue that funds operations and allows long-horizon bets on ventures.
about.flywheel_step2_desc: Venture building creates equity positions in startups. Early technical execution — the hardest phase — is made in exchange for meaningful ownership.
about.flywheel_step3_desc: Consulting puts GDI in contact with real operational problems that surface venture opportunities. Successful ventures attract better founders.
about.p1_body: We are not here to invoice and move on. When we take on a client engagement, we care whether the system actually works in practice. When we co-found a venture, we are invested in its success in the most literal sense.
about.p2_body: Everything GDI does connects to a bigger picture. The consulting work sharpens our technical skills, and the ventures we build grow our reputation and ownership. One feeds the other.
about.p3_body: GDI is rooted in Bandung and proudly focused on Indonesia, but we're open to working with anyone, anywhere. We believe building strong companies here is both a smart move and something that truly matters.
about.ventures_sub: Only ideas with strong conviction across all three dimensions get pursued under the venture-building model.
about.v1_body: Is there a real, significant problem being solved? Is it urgent, recurring, and wide enough in scope to build a defensible business around?
about.v2_body: Is the opportunity well-defined? Is there a reachable customer segment, a clear value exchange, and meaningful room for growth?
about.v3_body: Does the founder bring deep domain knowledge, real commitment, and the discipline to see the venture through its early stages?

services.hero_headline: Work that supports real operations and new ventures.
services.hero_sub: GDI works in two ways depending on who you are. Whether you're an organization or a founder, how we work together may look different, but the commitment to real, lasting results is always the same.
services.orgs_intro: End-to-end digital transformation for organizations across Indonesia.
services.o1_desc: Enterprise resource planning systems built on the Frappe ecosystem — customized to your specific operational workflows.
services.o2_desc: Deployment of AI agents and automation layers into your existing systems, including the GDI AI Agent.
services.o3_desc: Bespoke platforms and applications built to solve specific operational problems — not generic off-the-shelf solutions.
services.o4_desc: Architecture design and deployment of the digital infrastructure your organization needs to operate at scale.
services.o5_desc: System audits, technical strategy, and consulting engagements that surface where technology can create real value.
services.o6_desc: Long-term technical partnership — we stay after the build to ensure the system continues to work in practice.
services.founders_intro: A technical co-founding partnership for founders with strong ideas and the domain knowledge to back them.
services.f1_desc: GDI acts as your technical co-founder. We are responsible for turning concepts into working products and scalable systems.
services.f2_desc: End-to-end product development from architecture to launch — we own the technical execution entirely.
services.f3_desc: We contribute technical execution in exchange for equity or profit-sharing — aligning our incentives with yours.
services.f4_desc: From concept to launch, we handle the full technical build. No hand-offs, no gaps, no surprises.
services.f5_desc: We stay with the venture through its early stages — the phase where technical decisions have the longest consequences.
services.f6_desc: Founders who partner with GDI gain access to our technical infrastructure, tooling, and accumulated domain knowledge.
services.criteria_sub: Only ideas with strong conviction across all three dimensions get pursued.
services.c1_desc: A real, significant, and recurring problem with defensible business potential.
services.c2_desc: A well-defined opportunity with a reachable segment and clear value exchange.
services.c3_desc: Deep domain knowledge, genuine commitment, and the discipline to execute.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.headline: Let's build something.
contact.sub: Whether you have a project in mind or want to explore what working together might look like — reach out. We prefer to begin with a conversation.
contact.form_message: Tell us about what you're building or what you need
